lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਆਵਹੁ ਭਾਈਹੋ ਗਲਿ ਮਿਲਹ ਮਿਲਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਦੇਹ ਆਸੀਸਾ ਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa aavahu bhaaeeho gal milah mil mil deh aaseesaa he |
lines.english: Come, O Baba, and Siblings of Destiny - let's join together; take me in your arms, and bless me with your prayers.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸੀਸਾ ਦੇਵਹੋ ਭਗਤਿ ਕਰੇਵਹੋ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਕਾ ਕਿਆ ਮੇਲੋ ॥
lines.translit: aaseesaa devaho bhagat karevaho miliaa kaa kiaa melo |
lines.english: Bless me with your prayers, that I may perform devotional worship service to my Lord; for those already united with Him, what is there to unite?

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਸਚੜਾ ਮੇਲੁ ਨ ਚੁਕਈ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਕੀਆ ਦੇਹ ਅਸੀਸਾ ਹੇ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa sacharraa mel na chukee preetam keea deh aseesaa he |
lines.english: O Baba, union with the True Lord cannot be broken; bless me with your prayers for union with my Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਿ ਭੂਲੇ ਨਾਵਹੁ ਥੇਹਹੁ ਥਾਵਹੁ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਸਚੁ ਖੇਲੋ ॥
lines.translit: eik bhoole naavahu thehahu thaavahu gurasabadee sach khelo |
lines.english: Some have wandered away from the Name of the Lord, and lost the Path. The Word of the Guru's Shabad is the true game.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਣਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਮਾਣਾ ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਵੇਸੇ ॥
lines.translit: jam maarag nahee jaanaa sabad samaanaa jug jug saachai vese |
lines.english: Do not go on Death's path; remain merged in the Word of the Shabad, the true form throughout the ages.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਜਨ ਸੈਣ ਮਿਲਹੁ ਸੰਜੋਗੀ ਗੁਰ ਮਿਲਿ ਖੋਲੇ ਫਾਸੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: saajan sain milahu sanjogee gur mil khole faase |2|
lines.english: Through good fortune, we meet such friends and relatives, who meet with the Guru, and escape the noose of Death. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਨਾਂਗੜਾ ਆਇਆ ਜਗ ਮਹਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਲੇਖੁ ਲਿਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa naangarraa aaeaa jag meh dukh sukh lekh likhaaeaa |
lines.english: O Baba, we come into the world naked, into pain and pleasure, according to the record of our account.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਿਖਿਅੜਾ ਸਾਹਾ ਨਾ ਟਲੈ ਜੇਹੜਾ ਪੁਰਬਿ ਕਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: likhiarraa saahaa naa ttalai jeharraa purab kamaaeaa |
lines.english: The call of our pre-ordained destiny cannot be altered; it follows from our past actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਜਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਆ ਤਿਤੁ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: beh saachai likhiaa amrit bikhiaa jit laaeaa tith laagaa |
lines.english: The True Lord sits and writes of ambrosial nectar, and bitter poison; as the Lord attaches us, so are we attached.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਣਿਆਰੀ ਕਾਮਣ ਪਾਏ ਬਹੁ ਰੰਗੀ ਗਲਿ ਤਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaamaniaaree kaaman paae bahu rangee gal taagaa |
lines.english: The Charmer, Maya, has worked her charms, and the multi-colored thread is around everyone's neck.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਛੀ ਮਤਿ ਭਇਆ ਮਨੁ ਹੋਛਾ ਗੁੜੁ ਸਾ ਮਖੀ ਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: hochhee mat bheaa man hochhaa gurr saa makhee khaaeaa |
lines.english: Through shallow intellect, the mind becomes shallow, and one eats the fly, along with the sweets.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਮਰਜਾਦੁ ਆਇਆ ਕਲਿ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਨਾਂਗੋ ਬੰਧਿ ਚਲਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naa marajaad aaeaa kal bheetar naango bandh chalaaeaa |3|
lines.english: Contrary to custom, he comes into the Dark Age of Kali Yuga naked, and naked he is bound down and sent away again. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਿਖਿਅੜਾ ਲੇਖੁ ਨ ਮੇਟੀਐ ਦਰਿ ਹਾਕਾਰੜਾ ਆਇਆ ਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: likhiarraa lekh na metteeai dar haakaararraa aaeaa hai |
lines.english: The pre-ordained record of destiny cannot be erased; the summons has come from the Lord's Court.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬਾ ਰੋਵਹੁ ਜੇ ਕਿਸੈ ਰੋਵਣਾ ਜਾਨੀਅੜਾ ਬੰਧਿ ਪਠਾਇਆ ਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: baabaa rovahu je kisai rovanaa jaaneearraa bandh patthaaeaa hai |
lines.english: O Baba, weep and mourn if you must; the beloved soul is bound and driven off.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਾਕਾਰਾ ਆਇਆ ਜਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਇਆ ਰੁੰਨੇ ਰੋਵਣਹਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: haakaaraa aaeaa jaa tis bhaaeaa rune rovanahaare |
lines.english: The messenger comes, when it pleases the Lord, and the mourners begin to mourn.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੁਤ ਭਾਈ ਭਾਤੀਜੇ ਰੋਵਹਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਅਤਿ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: put bhaaee bhaateeje roveh preetam at piaare |
lines.english: Sons, brothers, nephews and very dear friends weep and wail.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਰੋਵੈ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਰਿ ਸਮਾਲੇ ਕੋ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਮੁਇਆ ਨਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: bhai rovai gun saar samaale ko marai na mueaa naale |
lines.english: Let him weep, who weeps in the Fear of God, cherishing the virtues of God. No one dies with the dead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਜਾਣ ਸਿਜਾਣਾ ਰੋਵਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਸਮਾਲੇ ॥੪॥੫॥
lines.translit: naanak jug jug jaan sijaanaa roveh sach samaale |4|5|
lines.english: O Nanak, throughout the ages, they are known as wise, who weep, remembering the True Lord. ||4||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਮਹਲਾ ਤੀਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 3 mahalaa teejaa |
lines.english: Wadahans, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਧਨ ਰੰਡ ਨ ਕਬਹੂ ਬੈਸਈ ਨਾ ਕਦੇ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: saa dhan randd na kabahoo baisee naa kade hovai sog |
lines.english: The soul-bride shall never be a widow, and she shall never have to endure suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਚੜਾ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਣੈ ਜੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: prabh sacharraa har saalaaheeai kaaraj sabh kichh karanai jog |
lines.english: Praise God, the True Lord; He is all-powerful to do all things.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਕਦੇ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੋਗੁ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰਸ ਭੋਗ ਸਾ ਧਨ ਮਹਲਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: naa kade hovai sog anadin ras bhog saa dhan mehal samaanee |
lines.english: She shall never suffer - night and day, she enjoys pleasures; that soul-bride merges in the Mansion of her Lord's Presence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਜਾਤਾ ਕਰਮ ਬਿਧਾਤਾ ਬੋਲੇ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: jin priau jaataa karam bidhaataa bole amrit baanee |
lines.english: She knows her Beloved, the Architect of karma, and she speaks words of ambrosial sweetness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੜਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਣੈ ਜੋਗੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sacharraa pir saalaaheeai sabh kichh karanai jogo |1|
lines.english: So praise your True Husband Lord, who is all-powerful to do all things. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣਵੰਤੀਆ ਗੁਣ ਸਾਰਹਿ ਅਪਣੇ ਕੰਤ ਸਮਾਲਹਿ ਨਾ ਕਦੇ ਲਗੈ ਵਿਜੋਗੋ ॥
lines.translit: gunavanteea gun saareh apane kant samaaleh naa kade lagai vijogo |
lines.english: The virtuous soul-brides dwell on the Lord's virtues; they keep their Husband Lord in their remembrance, and so they never suffer separation from Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੜਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਣੀਐ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sacharraa saahib sabad pachhaaneeai aape le milaae |
lines.english: The True Lord and Master is realized through the Word of His Shabad; He blends all with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਧਨ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤੀ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: saa dhan pria kai rang ratee vichahu aap gavaae |
lines.english: That soul-bride is imbued with the Love of her Husband Lord, who banishes her self-conceit from within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਚਹੁ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਏ ਫਿਰਿ ਕਾਲੁ ਨ ਖਾਏ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: vichahu aap gavaae fir kaal na khaae guramukh eko jaataa |
lines.english: Eradicating her ego from within herself, death shall not consume her again; as Gurmukh, she knows the One Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਣਿ ਇਛ ਪੁੰਨੀ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਭਿੰਨੀ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਦਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: kaaman ichh punee antar bhinee miliaa jagajeevan daataa |
lines.english: The desire of the soul-bride is fulfilled; deep within herself, she is drenched in His Love. She meets the Great Giver, the Life of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੀ ਜੋਬਨਿ ਮਾਤੀ ਪਿਰ ਕੈ ਅੰਕਿ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sabad rang raatee joban maatee pir kai ank samaae |
lines.english: Imbued with love for the Shabad, she is like a youth intoxicated; she merges into the very being of her Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੜਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਣੀਐ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sacharraa saahib sabad pachhaaneeai aape le milaae |2|
lines.english: The True Lord Master is realized through the Word of His Shabad. He blends all with Himself. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਆਪਣਾ ਕੰਤੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਪੂਛਉ ਸੰਤਾ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jinee aapanaa kant pachhaaniaa hau tin poochhau santaa jaae |
lines.english: Those who have realized their Husband Lord - I go and ask those Saints about Him.
